name: playful
description: Smoothie-making fun with colorful powder pours, ingredient tosses, and the creative joy of mixing your own wellness blends. This mood makes supplements feel approachable and enjoyable — wellness should be delicious, not medicinal.

style.lighting: bright cheerful kitchen light | colorful powder highlight | clean even daylight
style.color_grade: bright greens and golds | berry accent pops | fresh clean palette
style.camera: overhead smoothie making | freeze-frame powder pour | fun close-up mixing
style.composition: colorful ingredient arrangement | smoothie bowl art | mid-action powder toss
style.props: blender, colorful powder scoops, fresh fruit, smoothie bowls, fun toppings, glass straws

copy_tone: Fun and approachable. Makes supplement routines feel exciting. Uses flavor language and creative recipe ideas. 'Your morning smoothie just leveled up.' Turns health into a treat.

music.mood: happy pop, kitchen vibes, upbeat cheerful

example_prompt_fragment: A fun overhead shot of smoothie making in progress, GAIA Supplements green powder being scooped into a blender with fresh mango and spinach, colorful berry toppings scattered around, bright cheerful kitchen lighting, a mid-pour freeze frame of golden powder, fresh clean green and gold color palette with berry accents, playful wellness lifestyle photography
